text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 83 

TEST_PRMRY_PMT 

LABEL: Tests Primary Payer Amount 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates the total amount paid for Part B tests by a primary payer other than Medicare for 
a given year. Claims for tests are a subset of the claims in the Part B carrier data file. 

These claim lines are defined as those with a line BETOS code (BETOS_CD) where the first digit = T. The 
total
